Black Swans Everywhere as VLCCs Surge - The most severe conflict in the Middle East in decades has introduced

[Page 1]
Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
June 17, 2025
• Black Swans Everywhere as VLCCs Surge - The most severe conflict in the
Short-term Indicators
Middle East in decades has introduced considerable instability into the oil markets,
Momentum: Positive
which in turn has impacted tanker shipping operations. The ongoing war
Sentiment: Positive
between Israel and Iran has significantly heightened risks to oil supplies, while the
trajectory of the situation remains uncertain in the coming days and weeks. Given Fundamentals: Positive
that the broader Middle East accounts for more than 25% of seaborne oil, such
increased uncertainty is to be expected.
